ai_summary:
I have analyzed the changes since your last visit.

Overall NPS has improved to 85.15, up by 2 points. The standout performer is TP6 Booking of Package Experience, which surged by 48.49 points to an NPS of 66.67, indicating significant enhancement in customer satisfaction. Conversely, the SOUTH (Region) - SHX (Location) - GND (Branch) experienced the steepest decline, dropping 33.33 points to an NPS of 66.67.

Key customer concerns include delivery issues, with multiple reports of late or incorrect deliveries, highlighting a churn risk. Additionally, customer service quality has been called into question, particularly in the WEST (Region) - BOM (Location) - ADR (Branch). Addressing these critical areas will be essential to maintain and accelerate our positive momentum.
